new_classes.label_en: Blended malt whisky, in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Malt-Whisky, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended malt Scotch whisky produced by blending two or more single malt Scotch whiskies distilled at different distilleries, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The three core distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) blended malt Scotch whisky identity via producedBy some BlendedMaltWhiskyBlendingProcess and has_quality some BlendedMaltScotchWhiskyQuality; (2) container size > 2 L via has_part some LargeContainer, which is disjoint from SmallContainer (< 2 L) by their equivalentClass definitions, thereby implicitly discriminating this subheading from sibling 22083041 (≤ 2 L). The occurs_in ScotlandSite restriction is intentionally omitted from this call (it was placed on BlendedMaltWhiskyBlendingProcess in a previous call and may already be in the running TBox context). Residual gap (0.12): the "different distilleries" nuance is not directly expressible in OWL DL class axioms.
